top_stories.title: Prime Infrastructure plants tapped to supply power after outages
top_stories.summary: The government has tapped three major natural gas plants operated by Prime Infrastructure Capital Inc. to dispatch additional capacity to the Luzon grid after several power plants experienced forced outages, triggering a yellow alert across the grid last week.
